title: atomwrite WAL recovery report
description: Output of `atomwrite wal-recovery <dir>` — scans `.atomwrite.journal.*.json` sidecars and emits one entry per orphan journal (last entry is `Started` with no matching `Committed`).

journal_path.description: Absolute path to the orphan journal sidecar.

target.description: The target file the journal was protecting.

op_id.description: 16-hex-char operation ID correlating with the original `Started` entry.

op.description: Operation type that was in progress when the crash occurred.

expected_new_checksum.description: BLAKE3 of the content the caller intended to write.

checksum_before.description: BLAKE3 of the original content; `null` if the target did not exist.

started_at_unix.description: Unix seconds when the `Started` entry was appended.

pid.description: Process ID that started the write.
